task_completion.description: Create the four specified Category Options for the projects.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the DHIS2 Maintenance app showing 'Project Alpha', 'Project Beta', 'Project Gamma', and 'Project Delta' in the Category Options list or creation screens.

task_completion.description: Create Category Option Groups for Global Fund and USAID, and map the correct projects to them.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing two Category Option Groups (names containing 'Global Fund' and 'USAID'). The Global Fund group must contain Project Alpha and Project Beta. The USAID group must contain Project Gamma and Project Delta.

task_completion.description: Create a Category Option Group Set named 'Donor Funding Source' containing the two groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a Category Option Group Set named exactly 'Donor Funding Source' with the Global Fund and USAID groups assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Donor Funding Source' group set as a Data dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Category Option Group Set configuration for 'Donor Funding Source' showing the 'Data dimension' checkbox checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Configure a Pivot Table with 'ANC 1st visit', 'Organisation unit', and the new 'Donor Funding Source' dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the DHIS2 Data Visualizer app showing a pivot table layout that includes 'ANC 1st visit' (Data), 'Organisation unit', and 'Donor Funding Source' as selected dimensions.

task_completion.description: Save the Pivot Table with the required name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the pivot table saved in the Data Visualizer app with the title 'Donor Funding Analysis 2024' (or 'Donor Funding Analysis').

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the DHIS2 Maintenance and Data Visualizer apps, rather than terminal windows executing API commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visuals match the standard DHIS2 interface (v2.40) and do not appear to be a text editor, mockup, or static HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running psql or SQL commands to insert metadata directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses the DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database. When verifying Category Option Groups, accept names that contain 'Global Fund' and 'USAID' (case-insensitive, with or without the 'Donor:' prefix). The Category Option Group Set must be named exactly 'Donor Funding Source' and have the 'Data dimension' setting enabled. For the final pivot table, the exact saved name ('Donor Funding Analysis 2024' vs 'Donor Funding Analysis') is less critical than ensuring the 'Donor Funding Source' dimension, 'ANC 1st visit' data, and 'Organisation unit' are actively used in the visualization layout.
